findings.expected: Behavioral code changes should include corresponding test updates where relevant.
findings.observed: Detected source changes without matching test file changes.
findings.remediation: Add targeted unit tests for modified modules and critical edge cases.
findings.title: Code changed without nearby test updates
verification: Review changed modules for edge cases

evidence: No files matched docs patterns in the change set.
findings.expected: Docs/examples/changelog should stay aligned with behavior and API changes.
findings.observed: No documentation files changed alongside code updates.
findings.remediation: Update README/docs/changelog to reflect behavior, API, and configuration changes.
findings.title: Code changed without documentation updates

findings.expected: Configuration should remain stable and coordinated across contributors.
findings.observed: 26 recent commits touched config/infra files in lookback window.
findings.remediation: Consolidate config ownership, batch related changes, and document rationale in PRs.
findings.title: Recent config churn detected

suggested_actions.patch_approach: Apply deterministic fixes first (formatter/lint/rule-based edits), then targeted manual refactors.
suggested_actions.title: Recent config churn detected
suggested_actions.what_to_change: Consolidate config ownership, batch related changes, and document rationale in PRs.
